_comment: ONS direct-debit failure rate (headline Total NSA, % of attempted DD transactions). Sourced from the ONS 'Monthly Direct Debit failure rate and average transaction amount' xlsx — sheet '1.DD Failure Rates Total NSA'. AUDIT 2026-04-27: previous fixture carried 1.8% — that does not match any month in the headline Total NSA series (2024-2026 range 2.08-2.56%); appears to have been taken from a sub-category (Mortgages or Water). Corrected to March 2026 = 2.41% per the 23 April 2026 ONS bulletin. TODO(source): wire in the ONS xlsx parser — the dataset has a stable URL and clean monthly schema.
